content.text: How can I dynamically create and configure a complex component or model using a dictionary of parameters?
If a component is successfully instantiated via its `class_name`, will it always be added to `_refs`, even if some of the parameter initialization fails?
It is only added to `_refs` if the instantiation process completes without raising an exception in lines 38-46. If exceptions occur during setup, registration does not happen.
That clarifies exactly how state changes are handled when building these components.
